programme.desc: S1 , E17 : Facing abandonment and pain, a resilient single mother and her three daughters stand united and strong, weathering life's various challenges with perseverance and grace.

programme.title: Veen Doghantali Hi Tutena
programme.desc: S1 , E321 : Samar, a wealthy tycoon, and Swanandi, a young middle-class professional, enter a marriage of convenience. However, their contractual nuptials gradually evolve into a profound connection.

programme.title: Deep Jyoti
programme.desc: S1 , E80 : The lives of three sisters take a dramatic turn when they marry into a prestigious, wealthy family. Jyoti must navigate family tensions to solve the mystery of her brother's death.

programme.title: Sanai Chaughade
programme.desc: S1 , E104 : Weighed down by his past, Jay rejects the idea of love. But Sharvari comes into his life and destiny ignites a conflict of beliefs, compelling them to explore if they can mend past scars with love.

programme.title: Kamali
programme.desc: S1 , E358 : A courageous kabaddi champion hailing from the countryside of Maharashtra challenges her family's expectations by venturing to Mumbai in pursuit of her aspirations.

programme.title: Taarini
programme.desc: S1 , E308 : Taarini is a quiet daughter at home and a brave undercover cop outside. As she searches for justice for her mother, tough truths force her to make hard choices.

programme.title: Devmanus Madhla Adhyay
programme.desc: S1 , E367 : The notorious serial killer, Dr Ajitkumar Dev, relocates to Varanasi where he assumes the identity of Gopal, a tailor who disappeared years ago, and continues his reign of terror.

programme.title: Tula Japnar Aahe
programme.desc: S1 , E452 : After Ambika's tragic death, her husband Atharva and daughter Veda are heartbroken. However, her spirit returns to watch over and protect Veda in unseen yet powerful ways.

programme.desc: Jeevan and Puja's lives change forever when they become victims of a bad curse. While Jeevan and his friend lose their lives, Puja takes the form of a snake.

programme.title: Abhagini
programme.desc: Abhagini is tortured by her stepmother all her life, but she decides to make a new start after leaving the city. Initially, the new family she is living with dislikes her, but she soon wins them over.

programme.title: Bhalobasi Tomake
programme.desc: With a temper that's always on the verge of boiling over, a young man's life is transformed in an instant when he meets a woman who brings out the best in him.

programme.title: Satru Mitra
programme.desc: A happy family goes through various trials and tribulations and falls apart when greed takes precedence over relationships.

programme.title: Thai Curry

programme.title: Aankhen
programme.desc: After being sacked from his position as a bank manager, a temperamental man plots revenge by orchestrating a robbery, enlisting three unlikely accomplices.

programme.title: Golmaal Returns
programme.desc: Gopal gets stuck in a yacht for a night after he saves an attractive young woman. However, his wife, Ekta, suspects him of having an affair and decides to uncover the truth.

programme.title: 102 Not Out
programme.desc: Dattatraya Vakharia, a 102-year-old man with the heart of a child, lives with his 75-year-old son, Babulal. Full of energy, he aims to break the world record for the oldest man alive.

programme.title: Phir Hera Pheri
programme.desc: The lives of Raju, Shyam and Baburao change completely when they get cheated by a fraudster. Desperate to repay a loan from a feared gangster, they scramble to find an alternative solution.

programme.title: Gabbar Is Back
programme.desc: The city's administration wrongs Aditya, a commoner. To avenge his tragedy, he disguises himself as a vigilante, Gabbar, and teams up with honest government officers to expose the corrupt.

programme.title: Selfiee
programme.desc: An RTO officer, Om Prakash, lands the opportunity to meet his idol, Vijay Kumar. However, a misunderstanding between the two men results in a clash of egos.

programme.title: Shamitabh
programme.desc: A mute man who dreams of becoming an actor and a man come together for a purpose, but their differences cause them to drift apart due to their egos.

programme.title: Bhuj: The Pride of India
programme.desc: Squadron Leader Vijay Karnik of the IAF races to conclude his task and shape history with the aid of 300 women during the 1971 Indo-Pakistani conflict.

programme.title: Uri: The Surgical Strike
programme.desc: Major Vihaan Singh Shergill of the Indian Army leads a covert operation against a group of militants who attacked a base in Uri, Kashmir, in 2016 and killed many soldiers.

programme.title: Rocky Aur Rani Ki Prem Kahani
programme.desc: After facing the differences and family opposition, Rocky and Rani decide to live with each other's families for three months before getting married.

programme.title: Govinda Naam Mera
programme.desc: Govinda Waghmare, who is stuck with his controlling wife, seeks love from his gorgeous girlfriend which leads him into a chaotic situation.
